name: Transformed Into a Tomboy
description:
[MtF POV] [tgtf]

Huh, guess you're a tomboy now? Still gotta deal with college though...




You were exhausted from a taxing day of classes, walking back to your dorm only to get caught in a trap that spiraled into you and your attacker into being transformed into women. AND you still have college classes to contend with...



I defined the transformation in the first message as i find that helps the ai to keep it consistent, but i left it vague enough you should be able to define more specific details like a tan and your room or maybe try and get extra magic paper to change more things like bigger breasts, being a futa if you want, etc.
creator: sigmacylsm
